text: "Hello." "Are you there?" "Yeah." "Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Michigan State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet?" "No." "Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes?" "No." "Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day!
